member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.CrossFirebaseRemoteConfig.IsSupported
member.summary: Gets if the plugin is supported on the current platform.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.CrossFirebaseRemoteConfig.Current
member.summary: Current plugin implementation to use

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.CrossFirebaseRemoteConfig.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose of everything

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig
member.summary: Firebase Remote Config class. It can be created and used to fetch, activate and read config results and set default config results.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.EnsureInitializedAsync
member.summary: Ensures initialization is complete and clients can begin querying for Remote Config values.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.SetRemoteConfigSettingsAsync(Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.RemoteConfigSettings)
member.summary: Config settings are custom settings.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.SetDefaultsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Sets config defaults for parameter keys and values in the default namespace config.
member.param: A dictionary of key value pairs representing the default values.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.SetDefaultsAsync(System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Object}[])
member.summary: Sets config defaults for parameter keys and values in the default namespace config.
member.param: Tuples of key value pairs representing the default values.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.FetchAndActivateAsync
member.summary: Fetches Remote Config data and if successful, activates fetched data.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.FetchAsync(System.Double)
member.summary: Fetches Remote Config data and sets a duration that specifies how long config data lasts. Call ActivateAsync() to make fetched data available to your app.
member.param: Override the (default or optionally set MinimumFetchInterval property in RemoteConfigSettings) MinimumFetchInterval for only the current request, in seconds. Setting a value of 0 seconds will force a fetch to the backend.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.ActivateAsync
member.summary: Applies Fetched Config data to the Active Config, causing updates to the behavior and appearance of the app to take effect (depending on how config data is used in the app).

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.GetKeysByPrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the set of parameter keys that start with the given prefix, from the default namespace in the active config.
member.param: The key prefix to look for. If prefix is null or empty, returns all the keys.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.GetBoolean(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the parameter value for the given key as a boolean.
member.param: A Firebase Remote Config parameter key with a boolean parameter value.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.GetString(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the parameter value for the given key as a string.
member.param: A Firebase Remote Config parameter key.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.GetLong(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the parameter value for the given key as a long.
member.param: A Firebase Remote Config parameter key with a long parameter value.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.GetDouble(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the parameter value for the given key as a double.
member.param: A Firebase Remote Config parameter key with a double parameter value.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.IFirebaseRemoteConfig.Info
member.summary: Wraps the current state of the FirebaseRemoteConfig singleton object.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.RemoteConfigInfo
member.summary: Wraps the current state of the FirebaseRemoteConfig singleton object.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.RemoteConfigInfo.ConfigSettings
member.summary: Gets the current settings of the FirebaseRemoteConfig singleton object.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.RemoteConfigInfo.LastFetchTime
member.summary: Gets the timestamp (milliseconds since epoch) of the last successful fetch, regardless of whether the fetch was activated or not.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.RemoteConfigInfo.LastFetchStatus
member.summary: Gets the status of the most recent fetch attempt.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.RemoteConfigSettings
member.summary: Firebase Remote Config settings.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.RemoteConfigSettings.MinimumFetchInterval
member.summary: Returns the minimum interval between successive fetches calls in seconds.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.RemoteConfig.RemoteConfigSettings.FetchTimeout
member.summary: Returns the fetch timeout in seconds.
